testcase.name: verifyUserCanCancelSubscription

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element
...
is not clickable at point (1407, 40). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.160) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [bac896fd837733c37cdad88368083098, clickElement {id=f.E40F8EEDAFE9FC0170B3995E67AA2004.d.D30609FBC5C8A4BC0AEB223F27D23C88.e.123}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.160, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\SAFWAN~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:53959}, goog:processID: 11552, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:53959/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.160, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (bac896fd837733c37cdad88368083098)] -> xpath: //div[text()='Subscriptions']] Session ID: bac896fd837733c37cdad88368083098
